heading: Loan interest rates charged by Farmers Home Administration; grant funds associated with loans
label: 1927a Loan interest rates charged by Farmers Home Administration; grant funds associated with loans
text: Effective , and thereafter, in the case of water and waste disposal and community facility borrowers, and effective , and thereafter, in the case of housing and farm borrowers, upon request of the borrower, the interest rate charged by the Farmers Home Administration to such borrowers shall be the lower of the rates in effect at either the time of loan approval or loan closing and any Farmers Home Administration grant funds associated with such loans shall be set in amount based on the interest rate in effect at the time of loan approval.October 1, 1981November 12, 1983
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Supplemental Appropriations Act, 1985, and not as part of the Consolidated Farm and Rural Development Act which comprises this chapter.

Amendments1988— substituted “Effective , and thereafter, in the case of water and waste disposal and community facility borrowers, and effective , and thereafter, in the case of housing and farm borrowers” for “Effective , and thereafter” and “to such borrowers” for “to housing, farm, water and waste disposal, and community facility borrowers”.Pub. L. 100–233October 1, 1981November 12, 1983November 12, 1983
